title: Ħtiġiet dwar Standards u Prattika dwar is-Sehem ta' Nies bla Ħarsien Xieraq fil-Mezzi tax-Xandir
title_en: Ħtiġiet dwar Standards u Prattika dwar is-Sehem ta' Nies bla Ħarsien Xieraq fil-Mezzi tax-Xandir
description: Official text from legislation.mt (eli/sl/350.15/mlt, expression eli/sl/350.15/20100722/mlt).

provisions.title: Prattika dwar is-Sehem ta’ Nies bla }arsien xieraq fil-Mezzi taxXandir
kopja tad-dikjarazzjoni ta’ dak li jin]tie[ ]arsien
provisions.content: L-im[iba tal-mezzi tax-xandir lejn nies jin]tie[u ]arsien

provisions.title: programmi fuq il-mezzi tax-xandir
provisions.content:
Seduti jsiru wkoll meta tkun ilpersuna stess (kemm min u ri kif
ukoll adulta) li titlob biex tidher filprogramm.

provisions.title: ukoll adulta) li titlob biex tidher filprogramm
provisions.content:
Matul is-seduta jkun hemm
enfasi li l-persuna, kemm minuri kif
ukoll adulta, tkun tat il-kunsens
tag]ha ming]ajr ebda pressjoni.

provisions.title: tag]ha ming]ajr ebda pressjoni
provisions.content:
Fil-ka\ ta’ minuri, min itella’ lprogramm hu mistenni dejjem li
jimxi ma’ dak li jirri\ulta misseduta mmexxija mill-professjonist/
a minn APPO{{, li j/tkun ra/t la]jar interess tat-tfal.
